assertionResults.title: Production build produces multiple JS chunks
assertionResults.reason: `bun run build` completed successfully and produced 28 distinct client app JS chunk/node/entry files (>=3 required).

assertionResults.title: Queue-to-workspace navigation preserves context
assertionResults.reason: From `/download-queue`, clicking queue video `Where Should You Deploy In 2026?` navigated to workspace URL containing matching deep-link params for channel/video/context.

assertionResults.title: Highlights-to-workspace deep navigation
assertionResults.reason: From `/highlights`, clicking the highlight deep link navigated to workspace with `channel`, `video`, and `content=transcript` URL params matching the highlight target.

frictions.description: Element refs changed after queue page refresh; an initial click attempt timed out.
frictions.resolution: Re-captured annotated screenshot/snapshot and used refreshed element refs.
